message:
chore(deps): migrate huh v0.8 to charm.land/huh/v2 (GH#2471)

Migrate from github.com/charmbracelet/huh v0.8 to charm.land/huh/v2.
Updated import path, theme API (ThemeFunc wrapper), and upgraded
transitive dependency charmbracelet/x/cellbuf to resolve API conflicts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ import (
 	"strconv"
 	"strings"
 
-	"github.com/charmbracelet/huh"
+	"charm.land/huh/v2"
 	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/storage"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/storage/dolt"
@@ -407,7 +407,7 @@ func runCreateForm(cmd *cobra.Command) {
 				Affirmative("Create").
 				Negative("Cancel"),
 		),
-	).WithTheme(huh.ThemeDracula())
+	).WithTheme(huh.ThemeFunc(huh.ThemeDracula))
 
 	err := form.Run()
 	if err != nil {
